details: The agent successfully navigated to https://httpbin.org/html, retrieved the actual page content via browser automation, and accurately reported the first sentence of the text content ('Availing himself of the mild, summer-cool weather...'). The page was genuinely browsed (not hallucinated), as evidenced by the snapshot output showing the page structure with the Herman Melville - Moby-Dick heading. The agent correctly identified and quoted the first sentence of the paragraph text on the page.
